lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: I have to ask you to get back from here [sir/lady].

lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: This is the Lizardman Canyon. The lizardmen from the west are desperately trying to invade Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: We were able to hold them back, so they've started tunnelling under the kingdom and into this canyon to bypass our defences.

lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: Luckily, we were able to work out what they were doing and move to stop them. So far we've managed to keep them trapped within the canyon, but we need to constantly hold them at bay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a very strong adventurer. Would I be able to help out in the battle?

lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: No! We would never trust a stranger in the importance of a battle! A lot is at stake.

lines.speaker: Captain Rachelle
lines.text: You may. Head into the canyon and take the fight to those monsters!
